race.description: The Forum Insurance Group C2 Benchmark 62 Hcp
race.comment: KEEP AT 'EM (2) total forgive last start when crowded for room early and over raced with a fading ninth over 1850m at Newcastle. Back in trip from the good gate and look for him surging late. Go close in this company. ROSE WATER (8) handy mare due for a change of luck. Three runs back have been encouraging including the latest close-up seventh to Spanish Artist over 1550m at Canterbury in BM64 company. Should handle the conditions and figure prominently. SHOWTIME SHADOW (1) progressive gelding who jumped in trip with a tough on-pace fourth over 1500m at Newcastle. Should camp just off the leaders from the awkward gate and stays in the calculations. DARK JUSTICE (7) good debut winner last December, then resumed with a disappointing sixth over 1262m at this track on April 21. Tongue-tie goes on and look for a better performance.
